purpose: The operator navigation/routing contract: how a person gets from the Operations Cockpit to the CRM Command Center, the daily cards they see, what list/view each card opens, and the admin-only fallback links. Split out of config/M365_STAGE_8C_RELATIONSHIP_CRM_OPERATOR_WORKFLOW.json (kept as provenance). List/field/view structure lives in crm.sharepoint.json; the intake form contract lives in crm.intake.json.
entryPath: Operations Cockpit -> CRM Command Center -> New Signal -> CRM - New Signals -> Triage Queue

operationsCockpit.rule: The Operations Cockpit CRM card must link to the CRM Command Center page, not directly to a raw list or the legacy Intake Register.

crmCommandCenter.title: Relationship CRM Command Center
crmCommandCenter.role: Daily command center for business-development intake, triage, CRM stages, open actions, meeting preparation, evidence, health reviews, closeout, and invoice handoff readiness. Shows recognizable work queues and action cards, not a build packet or raw list catalog.

dailyCards.label: New Signal
dailyCards.intent: Capture a referral, opportunity, support signal, discovery start, or pasted email/context.
dailyCards.rule: This card must open the clean CRM - New Signals intake path. The Stage 8C failure was that the New/Add-intake card resolved (via Get-ListNewFormUrl) to the legacy Intake Register NewForm.aspx. That route is forbidden for this card.

dailyCards.label: Triage Queue
dailyCards.intent: Decide whether a signal needs qualification, nurture, follow-up, closure, or Adam review.

dailyCards.label: Follow Up Today
dailyCards.intent: Work dated follow-ups due today or overdue.

dailyCards.label: Proposal / Decision Blockers
dailyCards.intent: Clear scope, approval, decision, or go-live blockers.

dailyCards.label: Active Delivery
dailyCards.intent: Monitor delivery control and blocked execution.

dailyCards.label: Closeout / Invoice Watch
dailyCards.intent: Track final evidence, invoice handoff, payment follow-up, and closure.

stagePath.label: 1. Capture
stagePath.description: New opportunities, referrals, support signals, discovery starts, and pasted email/context enter here without source-message or mailbox fields.

stagePath.label: 2. Qualification
stagePath.description: Decide whether the signal is qualified, disqualified, nurture, proposal recommended, or converted.

stagePath.label: 3. Engagement Pipeline
stagePath.description: Track the relationship stage, package path, decision status, value, probability, and next action.

stagePath.label: 4. Decision / Proposal
stagePath.description: Keep decision blockers, proposal work, and go-live blockers visible until resolved.

stagePath.label: 5. Active Delivery
stagePath.description: Move qualified work into onboarding, active delivery, sustainment, or blocked execution control.

stagePath.label: 6. Closeout / Invoice
stagePath.description: Track closeout readiness, acceptance, invoice handoff, payment follow-up, and final evidence links.

adminOnlyFallback.label: Legacy Intake Register (admin only)
adminOnlyFallback.rule: Allowed to exist as a labelled admin-only fallback, but must not appear in any daily operator card or navigation node. The Chunk 3 verifier must FAIL if a daily card or visible page action resolves to this route.

forbiddenInDailyPath: raw list +New routes that expose technical/automation fields
Stage 8 build packet docs as operator instructions
